sku_name: FURNITURE LOOSE FURNITURE SOFA 3 SEATER SOFA - CHARME LUXURY 3 SEATER ELESTRO 2200mm (L) x 750mm (W) x 850mm (H)
specifications:
Charme ideally takes shape from the emotion of a warm and tender embrace.
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Rounded cylinderical armrest, delicate and comfortable shape to accommodate your body and make you feel safe.
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Vertical quilting creates eye-catching appeal, adding depth that brings your sitting décor to center stage.
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Designed to work well in both formal and informal settings
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  The collection include one seater, two seater and three seater sofa‎ 
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  --Construction
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Hardwood and Engineered wood frame
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Polyurethane foam in different density with polyester padding
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Unidirectional webbing suspension
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Designer legs in polished chrome / painted finish
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  --Upholstery
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Seat cushion with variable density foam to enhance comfort.‎
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Back cushions with variable density foam with polyester fiberfills to enhance comfort
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Vertical quilting on armrest sides and backrest cushions for comfortable seating and plush look
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Upholstery available in a range of fabric and faux leather

  Rounded cylinderical armrest, delicate and comfortable shape to accommodate your body and make you feel safe.
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Vertical quilting creates eye-catching appeal, adding depth that brings your sitting décor to center stage.
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Designed to work well in both formal and informal settings
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  The collection include one seater, two seater and three seater sofa‎ 
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  --Construction
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Hardwood and Engineered wood frame
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Polyurethane foam in different density with polyester padding
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Unidirectional webbing suspension
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Designer legs in polished chrome / painted finish
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  --Upholstery
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  ++Seat cushion with variable density foam to enhance comfort.‎
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Back cushions with variable density foam with polyester fiberfills to enhance comfort
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Vertical quilting on armrest sides and backrest cushions for comfortable seating and plush look
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  
 
 
  Upholstery available in a range of fabric and faux leather
